requirement_topic.en: Electromagnetic Compatibility — Household Refrigerating Appliances (Cambodia / ISC; CS adoption of IEC/CISPR)
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容——家用制冷器具（柬埔寨／ISC；CS采用IEC/CISPR）
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容——家用製冷器具（柬埔寨／ISC；CS採用IEC/CISPR）

summary.en: Cambodia does not operate an EU-style standalone EMC directive with self-declaration and a CE-equivalent mark. The Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) develops and adopts Cambodia Standards (CS), predominantly by transposing IEC and ASEAN-harmonised standards. Where EMC is addressed for household appliances, the relevant international references are the CISPR 14 series (CISPR 14-1 emission and CISPR 14-2 immunity) as adopted into CS, alongside any IEC 61000-series requirements that ISC may reference. Radio-enabled features (for example Wi-Fi or Bluetooth modules in smart refrigerators) fall under the Telecommunication Regulator of Cambodia (TRC) for type approval, which is a separate regime from appliance EMC. For most regulated products, conformity is demonstrated through import inspection and conformity assessment arranged by the in-country importer rather than a manufacturer self-declaration scheme. Exporters should confirm with ISC and the importer which CS EMC standards, if any, are currently mandatory or referenced for refrigerators, since Cambodia's appliance EMC regime is less codified than the EU's.
summary.zh: 柬埔寨不实行欧盟式独立电磁兼容指令（带自我声明及CE等效标志）。柬埔寨标准局（ISC）制定并采用柬埔寨标准（CS），主要通过转化IEC及东盟协调标准实现。在家用器具电磁兼容方面，相关国际参考为CISPR 14系列（CISPR 14-1发射与CISPR 14-2抗扰度）经采纳为CS，并辅以ISC可能引用的IEC 61000系列要求。具无线功能的产品（例如智能冰箱中的Wi-Fi或蓝牙模块）由柬埔寨电信监管局（TRC）进行型号核准，属于独立于器具电磁兼容的制度。对于多数受监管产品，合格性通过由在地进口商安排的进口检验与合格评定来证明，而非制造商自我声明机制。出口商应向ISC及进口商确认目前对冰箱是否有强制或被引用的CS电磁兼容标准，因为柬埔寨的器具电磁兼容制度成文化程度低于欧盟。
summary.zht: 柬埔寨不實行歐盟式獨立電磁相容指令（帶自我聲明及CE等效標誌）。柬埔寨標準局（ISC）制定並採用柬埔寨標準（CS），主要通過轉化IEC及東盟協調標準實現。在家用器具電磁相容方面，相關國際參考為CISPR 14系列（CISPR 14-1發射與CISPR 14-2抗擾度）經採納為CS，並輔以ISC可能引用的IEC 61000系列要求。具無線功能的產品（例如智能冰箱中的Wi-Fi或藍牙模塊）由柬埔寨電信監管局（TRC）進行型號核准，屬於獨立於器具電磁相容的制度。對於多數受監管產品，合格性通過由在地進口商安排的進口檢驗與合格評定來證明，而非製造商自我聲明機制。出口商應向ISC及進口商確認目前對冰箱是否有強制或被引用的CS電磁相容標準，因為柬埔寨的器具電磁相容制度成文化程度低於歐盟。

standards_or_laws: Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) — Cambodia Standard (CS) development and adoption of IEC/ASEAN standards
CISPR 14-1 / CISPR 14-2 series — international references for household appliance EMC emission and immunity, as adopted into CS where applicable
IEC 61000 series — referenced for harmonic and disturbance requirements where ISC adopts them
Telecommunication Regulator of Cambodia (TRC) — type approval for radio-enabled features (separate regime)

summary.en: China's EMC requirements for household appliances (including refrigerators) are primarily governed by GB 4343.1-2018 (emission limits and measurement methods; mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016) and GB/T 4343.2-2020 (immunity; recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015). For harmonic emissions, GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020) applies. These standards are enforced under the CCC mandatory certification regime administered by SAMR/CNCA. Because both China (via GB transposition of CISPR/IEC) and Cambodia (via ISC adoption of IEC/ASEAN/CISPR) trace to the same international parent standards, the underlying technical content is often closely aligned; the difference is administrative — Chinese CCC test reports are not automatically accepted in Cambodia's import inspection/conformity process without importer-arranged verification.
summary.zh: 中国家用器具（包括电冰箱）的电磁兼容要求主要依据GB 4343.1-2018（发射限值与测量方法；强制性；等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗扰度；推荐性；等同CISPR 14-2:2015）。谐波发射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（强制性；等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）适用。上述标准在市场监管总局/认证认可监督管理委员会（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC强制认证制度下执行。由于中国（通过GB转化CISPR/IEC）与柬埔寨（通过ISC采用IEC/东盟/CISPR）均源自相同的国际母标准，其底层技术内容往往高度一致；差异在于行政层面——中国CCC检测报告未经进口商安排的验证，不会在柬埔寨进口检验／合格评定流程中被自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國家用器具（包括電冰箱）的電磁相容要求主要依據GB 4343.1-2018（發射限值與測量方法；強制性；等同CISPR 14-1:2016）和GB/T 4343.2-2020（抗擾度；推薦性；等同CISPR 14-2:2015）。諧波發射方面，GB 17625.1-2022（強制性；等同IEC 61000-3-2:2020）適用。上述標準在市場監管總局/認證認可監督管理委員會（SAMR/CNCA）管理的CCC強制認證制度下執行。由於中國（通過GB轉化CISPR/IEC）與柬埔寨（通過ISC採用IEC/東盟/CISPR）均源自相同的國際母標準，其底層技術內容往往高度一致；差異在於行政層面——中國CCC檢測報告未經進口商安排的驗證，不會在柬埔寨進口檢驗／合格評定流程中被自動接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 4343.1-2018 — Electromagnetic disturbance characteristics of household appliances, electric tools and similar apparatus — Part 1: Emission (mandatory; equivalent to CISPR 14-1:2016; enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA)
GB/T 4343.2-2020 — Part 2: Immunity — product family standard (recommended; equivalent to CISPR 14-2:2015)
GB 17625.1-2022 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (mandatory; IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

gap.en: The technical EMC content is likely closely aligned, because both Chinese GB standards and Cambodian CS standards derive from the same CISPR/IEC parents. The practical gap is administrative rather than technical: (1) Cambodia has no EU-style self-declaration plus mark for appliance EMC — conformity is demonstrated through importer-arranged import inspection/conformity assessment, so Chinese CCC EMC reports are not automatically accepted and may need acceptance or re-verification through the Cambodian process; (2) the exact CS EMC standard references and their mandatory status for refrigerators should be confirmed with ISC, as Cambodia's appliance EMC regime is less codified than the EU's; (3) radio-enabled smart-refrigerator features require separate TRC type approval. Exporters should not assume an EU-style EMC route exists.
gap.zh: 电磁兼容技术内容可能高度一致，因为中国GB标准与柬埔寨CS标准均源自相同的CISPR/IEC母标准。实际差距偏行政而非技术：（1）柬埔寨没有欧盟式的器具电磁兼容自我声明加标志机制——合格性通过进口商安排的进口检验／合格评定证明，故中国CCC电磁兼容报告不被自动接受，可能需经柬埔寨流程接受或重新验证；（2）适用于冰箱的具体CS电磁兼容标准引用及其强制状态应向ISC确认，因为柬埔寨的器具电磁兼容制度成文化程度低于欧盟；（3）具无线功能的智能冰箱需单独取得TRC型号核准。出口商不应假设存在欧盟式电磁兼容路径。
gap.zht: 電磁相容技術內容可能高度一致，因為中國GB標準與柬埔寨CS標準均源自相同的CISPR/IEC母標準。實際差距偏行政而非技術：（1）柬埔寨沒有歐盟式的器具電磁相容自我聲明加標誌機制——合格性通過進口商安排的進口檢驗／合格評定證明，故中國CCC電磁相容報告不被自動接受，可能需經柬埔寨流程接受或重新驗證；（2）適用於冰箱的具體CS電磁相容標準引用及其強制狀態應向ISC確認，因為柬埔寨的器具電磁相容制度成文化程度低於歐盟；（3）具無線功能的智能冰箱需單獨取得TRC型號核准。出口商不應假設存在歐盟式電磁相容路徑。

mandatory_status.target: No EU-style standalone EMC directive; CS EMC standards adopted from CISPR/IEC may apply via ISC and importer-arranged import inspection/conformity assessment — mandatory status for refrigerators to be confirmed with ISC; radio features require TRC type approval
mandatory_status.cn: GB 4343.1-2018 is mandatory (GB) for CCC certification; GB/T 4343.2-2020 is recommended (GB/T); both enforced under CCC by SAMR/CNCA

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cambodia has no EU-style standalone appliance EMC directive. ISC adopts CS standards from IEC/CISPR (e.g. CISPR 14 series), so the underlying EMC technical content is likely close to China's GB 4343.1. The practical gap is administrative: Chinese CCC EMC test data is not automatically accepted and conformity runs through importer-arranged import inspection. Confirm applicable CS EMC references and their mandatory status with ISC, and route any radio-enabled features through TRC type approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 柬埔寨没有欧盟式独立器具电磁兼容指令。ISC从IEC/CISPR（如CISPR 14系列）采用CS标准，故底层电磁兼容技术内容可能与中国GB 4343.1接近。实际差距偏行政：中国CCC电磁兼容检测数据不被自动接受，合格性通过进口商安排的进口检验完成。请向ISC确认适用的CS电磁兼容引用及其强制状态，并将任何无线功能交由TRC进行型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 柬埔寨沒有歐盟式獨立器具電磁相容指令。ISC從IEC/CISPR（如CISPR 14系列）採用CS標準，故底層電磁相容技術內容可能與中國GB 4343.1接近。實際差距偏行政：中國CCC電磁相容檢測數據不被自動接受，合格性通過進口商安排的進口檢驗完成。請向ISC確認適用的CS電磁相容引用及其強制狀態，並將任何無線功能交由TRC進行型號核准。
